items.question: Write a Python function that implements binary search on a sorted list and returns the index of the target, or -1 if not found.

rubric.criterion: Handles edge cases (empty list, not found)

items.expected_answer: The bug is in range(1, n) — it excludes n itself. The factorial of n should include n in the product. Fix: range(1, n + 1).

rubric.criterion: Identifies the off-by-one error in range
Explains why the original was wrong

items.question: Design a rate limiter API that supports sliding window rate limiting. Describe the interface, data structure, and algorithm.
items.expected_answer: Interface: RateLimiter(max_requests, window_seconds). Method: allow(key) -> bool. Uses sorted timestamps per key, evicts entries outside the window, checks count against max_requests.
